input.complaint: I sent 5000 taka to a wrong number around 2pm today

output.agent_summary: Customer reports sending 5000 BDT to an unintended recipient around 2 PM today. Transaction TXN-9101 confirms a completed transfer of 5000 BDT at 14:08 UTC, consistent with the complaint.
output.recommended_next_action: Verify the recipient details of TXN-9101 with the customer. Initiate wrong transfer dispute process and contact the recipient's account for voluntary reversal per policy.
output.customer_reply: Thank you for contacting us. We have received your complaint regarding a transfer of 5000 BDT made around 2 PM today. Our dispute resolution team has been assigned to your case and will investigate TXN-9101 immediately. Any eligible amount will be returned through official channels after verification. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone. We will update you through this channel.
